name: collector reads git commit count for Activity dimension when activity opt-in is enabled
command:
mkdir -p space repo && (cd repo && git init -q && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m one && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m two) && printf 'dimensions:
  activity: {opt_in: true, enabled: true}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric activity-commits --git-root repo --config space/config.yaml --since 30d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dimension=activity' out.txt && grep -q 'commits=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
